raw_consumer_statement:
I was overcharged by a restaurant after leaving my tab open. I disputed a part of this charge with the card company. They came back and did not contact the restaurant or provide any proof I made this purchase. 

They sent me a letter saying the merchants response was inclosed, but this was completely blank and had no response or proof from the merchant. I then contacted the XXXX  where they sent the exact same response without contacting the merchant or requiring any proof that I made this purchase. 

Since I didn't authorize this charge, there will be no signature on file at the restaurant after they charged my card.
